description.content: These endpoints relate to PRB jobs

item.name: Factset Get Details for the Given Prb Job

request.name: Factset Get Details for the Given Prb Job

description.content: Use this endpoint to fetch the documents, tasks, accounts, and/or runs for the PRB job given in the path. Please note jobs with type PD will not return tasks nor accounts so this will be ignored if given as part of the array of attributes in the request.

query.description: The attribute parameter accepts a list of the given enums, separated by commas. Each of them returns the respective data associated with the job. Runs returns the run history of the job.

response.name: OK

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

Key to uniquely identify an Analytics API request. Only available after successful authentication.

Number of requests left for the time window.
Number of seconds remaining till rate limit resets.
